description:
Petition, fragment, in Arabic script. The sender says that he (or less likely someone else) is unable to provide for himself (a trope of petitions) and presumably asks for assistance. There is an interlinear draft in Arabic script between lines 2 and 3 which reads as "min maṭbakh al-maʾmūr".

In the margin is a draft of Bible commentary in Judaeo-Arabic, with biblical citations including Deuteronomy 33:2 and 18:18. (Information from CUDL)
description_he: עתירה, שבר, בכתב ערבי. השולח אומר שאינו מסוגל להתפרנס ומבקש סיוע. בין השורות טיוטת 'מן מטבח אל-מאמור'. בשוליים טיוטת פירוש מקרא ביהודית-ערבית.
